"C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\BuildTools\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\ptxc.dir/objects.a
C:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\ptxc.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\ptxc.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\MinGW\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\ptxc.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o ptxc.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libptxc.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\ptxc.dir\linkLibs.rsp
